key_findings.A_vs_B: EURADCLIM best globally but ERA5 better in rain-active hours — aggregate masks regime structure
key_findings.B_vs_C: No single winner when conflict is introduced — apparent best product is regime-dependent
key_findings.C_vs_D: Introducing leave-cell local baseline: ALL gridded products are worse than local; paradigm shift
key_findings.D_vs_E: Support >=2 filter reduces universe from 1,428,447 to 882,999 cell-hours; all-hours gap widens (+0.0187 -> +0.0206), rain-active gap widens (+0.474 -> +0.520)
key_findings.E_vs_F: Conflict-gated routing reduces all-hours MAE by 18% vs always-local; rain-active still needs local branch
